confluence.bug_requirements_link_text: Requirements for Creating a Jira Bug ticket
confluence.priority_definitions_link_text: Priority Definitions and Engineering Target Resolution

advisory.mention_intro: - This is an informational message from TriageBot. No modifications were made to this Jira ticket.
advisory.no_mention_intro: This is an informational message from TriageBot. No modifications were made to this Jira ticket.
advisory.story_action: TriageBot recommended action: Change this Bug to a Story.
advisory.priority_action: TriageBot recommended action: Change ticket Priority from {from_priority} to {to_priority}.
advisory.closing_bug: If you would like to keep it as a Bug, please explain your reasoning. Thanks.
advisory.closing_priority: If you would like to keep it as {current_priority}, please explain your reasoning. Thanks.

applied.mention_intro: - This is a message from TriageBot. This ticket has been reviewed and adjusted with the following:
applied.no_mention_intro: This is a message from TriageBot. This ticket has been reviewed and adjusted with the following:
applied.story_action: The issue type was changed from Bug to Story.
applied.priority_action: The ticket Priority was changed from {from_priority} to {to_priority}.
applied.closing_bug: If you would like to keep it as a Bug, please explain your reasoning. Thanks.
applied.closing_priority: If you would like to keep it as {current_priority}, please explain your reasoning. Thanks.
